products.title: Tom Ford Classic Designer Sunglasses
products.description: Elevate your look with Tom Ford’s luxury sunglasses featuring sleek design, high-quality lenses, and signature detailing. Perfect for a bold, timeless style.

products.title: Prada Rectangle Black Sunglasses
products.description: Make a bold statement with the Prada PR 17WS sunglasses, featuring an angular acetate frame, shaded lenses, and the iconic Prada logo. These designer shades blend modern edge with timeless luxury.

products.title: Louis Vuitton Sunglasses
products.description: Inspired by Pharrell Williams's passion for photography, the LV Super Vision Round Sunglasses feature a sleek design with white-lettered inscriptions, offering a modern twist on classic eyewear.
